title: Things from the cave
body:
![Lunar Ascent, last shots before the incident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5880bd70c6aa63d89aadc8767ab71957483d0668.png)

# About
This modpack strives to be different. It does not feature dozens of dwellers, ultrarealistic shaders, or over 100 mods. The goal of this modpack is to create a real horror experience. For the first 1-2 nights, everything will be silent. After that, you might encounter some small dangers. However, if you avoid making too much noise, you may survive a few additional nights.
Mods were picked extremely carefully and work perfectly together, creating a unique horror experience.

## Main mod
This modpack is built around "[The silence](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-silence)" mod but still has a few additional surprises.

The silence is very unique, it does not add a generic dweller or entity, everything starts with psychological attacks and only in the end it may damage you physically.
I will not say anything more than this so you can experience it all by yourself.

## why this modpack?
### Here is a short list of all the key features:
- **_Immersion:_** The modpack preserves the vanilla atmosphere but adds an additional layer of immersion. The most significant part of this is the PSX shaders by ckosmic.
- _**Balance:**_ You will not encounter overpowered Bigfoots that appear every 5 seconds and one-shot you. Everything will be balanced and avoidable (mostly).
- _**Consistency:**_ As was said before, i carefully pick every mod so that everything works perfectly together.
- **_Stability:_** I tested everything before uploading it, which is rare in nowadays.
- **_Multiplayer:_** Everything is compatible with multiplayer, thanks to e4mc you do not need to port forward to play with friends; just join the world and click the LAN button. If it is not working, then e4mc servers are dead lol.

# Contact info
mail: terack@tutamail.com

matrix: terack@matrix.org

2. deepslate background instead of dirt one - was taken from [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
3. main menu panorama - was made by me


P.S please do not turn off the shaders!
